page_metadata.biotools__summary: Symmetry Equivalent Molecules (SEM) is a tool for generating symmetrically equivalent three-dimensional (3D) molecules. This web based tool incorporates the graphics package of RASMOL for visualization, some configuration necessary.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Symmetry Equivalent Molecules (SEM) is a tool for generating symmetrically equivalent three-dimensional (3D) molecules. This web based tool incorporates the graphics package of RASMOL for visualization, some configuration necessary.
